questions.question: What does a TypeScript decorator actually do at the language level?
options: It changes the compiled JavaScript output of the class methods
It is a function that runs at class definition time and can attach metadata
It prevents the class from being instantiated directly
It adds new methods to the class prototype automatically

A runtime NullInjectorError is thrown: No provider for the service
The service is injected as undefined without any error
